test_queries.question: 过去 7 天的总 GMV 是多少？
test_queries.skill: 简单聚合 + 时间过滤
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(gmv) AS total_gmv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY

test_queries.question: 上周哪个国家 GMV 最高？
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT country, SUM(gmv) AS gmv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country ORDER BY gmv DESC LIMIT 1

test_queries.question: 过去 7 天每个国家每天的 pay_uv
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT dt, country, SUM(pay_uv) AS pay_uv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY dt, country ORDER BY dt, country

test_queries.question: 上周每个品类的 GMV 占比
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT category, SUM(gmv) AS gmv, SUM(gmv) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY) AS pct FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY category ORDER BY pct DESC

test_queries.question: 整体支付转化率 (pay_uv / impression_uv) 过去 7 天
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT SUM(pay_uv) * 100.0 / SUM(impression_uv) AS conv_pct FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY

test_queries.question: 过去 30 天里 GMV 环比上一周下降超过 10% 的国家
test_queries.skill: 窗口函数 LAG 或自连接 + 同比/环比
test_queries.reference_sql: WITH weekly AS (SELECT country, date_trunc('week', dt) AS wk, SUM(gmv) AS gmv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY country, date_trunc('week', dt)), with_lag AS (SELECT country, wk, gmv, LAG(gmv) OVER (PARTITION BY country ORDER BY wk) AS prev_gmv FROM weekly) SELECT country, wk, gmv, prev_gmv, (gmv - prev_gmv) / prev_gmv AS pct_change FROM with_lag WHERE prev_gmv IS NOT NULL AND (gmv - prev_gmv) / prev_gmv < -0.1 ORDER BY pct_change

test_queries.question: 不同年龄段 (age_group) 的 ARPU (人均消费)
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT u.age_group, SUM(d.pay_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.user_id) AS arpu FROM iceberg.dw.dws_user_daily d JOIN iceberg.dw.dim_user u ON d.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY u.age_group ORDER BY arpu DESC

test_queries.question: 各渠道带来的 GMV 占比
test_queries.skill: 维度 JOIN + 占比 (channel 在 dim_user 里，要先 JOIN)
test_queries.reference_sql: SELECT u.channel, SUM(d.pay_amount) AS gmv, SUM(d.pay_amount) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(pay_amount) FROM iceberg.dw.dws_user_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY) AS pct FROM iceberg.dw.dws_user_daily d JOIN iceberg.dw.dim_user u ON d.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '30' DAY GROUP BY u.channel ORDER BY gmv DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 今天总 GMV
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT SUM(gmv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt = current_date

few_shot_examples.question: 上周每个国家的 pay_uv
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT country, SUM(pay_uv) FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY GROUP BY country ORDER BY 2 DESC

few_shot_examples.question: 曝光到支付的总体转化率
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT SUM(pay_uv) * 100.0 / SUM(impression_uv) AS conv FROM iceberg.dw.ads_funnel_daily WHERE dt >= current_date - INTERVAL '7' DAY
